display.name: Bring Proof
display.short_description: The hamlet wants hard proof that a trail threat was dealt with before it pays out.

rules.briefing_text: Settle the marked trouble and bring back proof. The hamlet only pays for what it can hold in its hands.
rules.accepted_text: The marked pocket is live. Finish it, collect proof, then return for your reward.
rules.completed_text: The proof is in hand. Choose one payment before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The proof has already been turned in. This request is settled.
